consensus_findings.evidence: The function falls back to `_resolve_height_range` when `tiled_world` is set, which in turn falls back to the local heightmap's min/max. This causes each tile to be normalized to its own local range [0, 1], creating height steps/seams at tile borders in Unity.

findings.evidence: The function falls back to `_resolve_height_range` when `tiled_world` is set, which in turn falls back to the local heightmap's min/max. This causes each tile to be normalized to its own local range [0, 1], creating height steps/seams at tile borders in Unity.
findings.recommendation: Enforce a requirement for a global `height_range` when `tiled_world` is active, or ensure the range is persisted/shared across tile export operations to maintain vertical alignment.
findings.title: Tiled Terrain Height Normalization Seam Risk

consensus_findings.key: tools mcp toolkit blender addon handlers environment py resolve export height range tiled terrain height normalization
consensus_findings.recommendation: Enforce a requirement for a global `height_range` when `tiled_world` is active, or ensure the range is persisted/shared across tile export operations to maintain vertical alignment.
consensus_findings.title: Tiled Terrain Height Normalization Seam Risk

consensus_findings.evidence: Explicit `path_points_raw` are converted to tuples without verifying they contain the expected 3 components (X, Y, Z). Downstream mesh generation expecting 3D coordinates will fail if 2D points are provided.

findings.evidence: Explicit `path_points_raw` are converted to tuples without verifying they contain the expected 3 components (X, Y, Z). Downstream mesh generation expecting 3D coordinates will fail if 2D points are provided.
findings.recommendation: Validate that each input point has 3 components, or automatically pad 2D points with the `water_level` parameter to ensure 3D spline consistency.
findings.title: Missing Dimensionality Validation in Water Spline Path

consensus_findings.key: tools mcp toolkit blender addon handlers environment py resolve water path points missing dimensionality validation in
consensus_findings.recommendation: Validate that each input point has 3 components, or automatically pad 2D points with the `water_level` parameter to ensure 3D spline consistency.
consensus_findings.title: Missing Dimensionality Validation in Water Spline Path

consensus_findings.evidence: The transition from `terrain_origin_x + radius` to `terrain_origin_x - half + radius` correctly handles centered origins but will shift anchor positions for any existing map specs that were tuned against the previous corner-based assumptions.

findings.evidence: The transition from `terrain_origin_x + radius` to `terrain_origin_x - half + radius` correctly handles centered origins but will shift anchor positions for any existing map specs that were tuned against the previous corner-based assumptions.
findings.recommendation: Audit existing world map specifications to ensure their 'location' and 'radius' parameters align with the new centered-origin coordinate math.
findings.title: Shifted Anchor Logic in World Planner

consensus_findings.key: tools mcp toolkit src veilbreakers mcp blender server py plan map location anchors shifted anchor logic
consensus_findings.recommendation: Audit existing world map specifications to ensure their 'location' and 'radius' parameters align with the new centered-origin coordinate math.
consensus_findings.title: Shifted Anchor Logic in World Planner

consensus_findings.evidence: The function manually checks for 'height_range' and 'height_range_min/max' keys before calling `_resolve_height_range`, which repeats the exact same key checks internally.

findings.evidence: The function manually checks for 'height_range' and 'height_range_min/max' keys before calling `_resolve_height_range`, which repeats the exact same key checks internally.
findings.recommendation: Simplify the logic to call `_resolve_height_range` directly or rely on a single unified resolution path to reduce code duplication.
findings.title: Redundant Parameter Checks in Height Range Resolution
